title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.060 - Survey of water resources
text:
256.060.  Survey of water resources. — The state geologist is authorized to make a survey of the water resources of the state, including a survey of underground water supplies and the chemical composition of such waters.  Gauging stations shall be established and maintained, and such other field and laboratory work shall be done as may be deemed necessary.
(RSMo 1939 § 14891, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 311) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13702 
Water pollution control, Chap. 644
